message:
feat(codegen): Add unified NameGen for conflict-free parameter naming

Introduces a centralized naming system (name_gen.zig) that generates
unique parameter names using the pattern __m{counter}_p_{name}.
This eliminates ad-hoc naming conventions (__local, _arg, etc.).

Key changes:
- Add NameGen module with globally unique counter
- Set up parameter renames BEFORE signature generation in generators.zig
- Signature and body both use the same renames from var_renames map
- Clear var_renames at END of function to prevent leaking to module level
- Remove duplicate var_renames clearing from clearLocalVarTypes()

This fixes function parameters that shadow module-level variables being
incorrectly generated (parameter name vs body name mismatch).
